projectDescription: A React Native mobile cashier application for processing payments, managing shifts, and tracking transaction history on the Doss platform.
keyFeatures: Payment request flow — find user by ID and request a charge
Transaction history with refund and cancellation support
Offline detection with NetInfo and online/offline UI feedback
Profile management with QR code, PIN, and password settings
React Query data fetching with pagination and scroll-based loading
publicApiSurface: GET /api/ (home dashboard: today's sales, transactions, shift status)
GET /api/shifts (active shift info and elapsed time)
POST /api/request-payment (create a payment request for a user)
GET /api/refund/{id} (issue a refund for a transaction)
